creator: dockes@wanadoo.fr
text:
Update xapian-core to 1.2.3. Please note that I am also submitting
	patches for all the dependant ports at this time

        There does not seem to be any stated reason for keeping Xapian at
        1.0. The problem in ports/151579 was due to incompatible versions
        in the different ports, which should not be an issue if the updates
        are performed at the same time.
